skill.name: maxhub-pipixia
skill.description: 皮皮虾/PiPiXia platform data collection skill for funny content and community data. Activates when users mention PiPiXia, pipixia, funny videos, or jokes-related requests.
skill.summary: Collect and analyze PiPiXia social platform content, user stats, and trending data via MaxHub API
skill.author: MaxHub Team

security_audit.summary: Static analyzer flagged 96 potential issues as NEEDS_AI. Manual semantic evaluation reveals all findings are FALSE POSITIVES. Backtick patterns are markdown code fences (not Ruby execution), env_access references are legitimate API key usage for MaxHub authentication, and network URLs are the documented MaxHub API endpoints. No actual malicious behavior detected. The skill is a legitimate PiPiXia data collection tool with explicit security documentation.

content.user_title: Collect PiPiXia Content and Trending Data
content.value_statement: Content creators need to track trending topics and analyze viral content on PiPiXia. This skill provides structured API access to collect posts, user stats, hot searches, and community insights through MaxHub's secure proxy.
actual_capabilities: Fetch individual post details including view counts and engagement metrics
Retrieve user profiles, follower counts, and content lists
Access hot search rankings and trending topic data
Get comments and interaction data for any post
Search content by keywords across the platform
Generate short URLs for content sharing
limitations: Requires valid MaxHub API key (not free tier)
Cannot perform engagement actions (likes, follows, comments)
Rate limited by MaxHub API (default 60 calls per minute)
Some user data may be private or restricted by platform

use_cases.title: Track Trending Topics for Content Ideas
use_cases.description: Marketing teams monitor hot searches and trending hashtags to discover content opportunities and stay ahead of viral trends on PiPiXia.

use_cases.title: Analyze Creator Performance
use_cases.description: Influencer managers retrieve detailed statistics for creators they manage, including follower growth, post engagement rates, and content performance metrics.

use_cases.title: Competitive Research Across Platforms
use_cases.description: Researchers compare trending content patterns across Chinese social platforms by collecting and comparing hot search data from multiple sources.

prompt_templates.title: Find Trending Content
prompt_templates.prompt: Search PiPiXia for popular videos about [TOPIC] from the past week. Show me the top 10 results with their view counts and engagement data.
prompt_templates.scenario: When user wants to discover trending content on a specific topic

prompt_templates.title: Get User Statistics
prompt_templates.prompt: Get detailed stats for the PiPiXia creator [USERNAME/ID]. Include their follower count, total posts, average engagement, and their most successful recent videos.
prompt_templates.scenario: When user wants to analyze a specific creator's performance

prompt_templates.title: Monitor Hot Searches
prompt_templates.prompt: What are the current hot search terms on PiPiXia? List the top 20 trending topics with their search volume indicators.
prompt_templates.scenario: When user wants to check current trending topics

prompt_templates.title: Compare Content Performance
prompt_templates.prompt: Compare the performance of these two PiPiXia posts: [POST_ID_1] and [POST_ID_2]. Show detailed statistics including views, likes, comments, and shares for each.
prompt_templates.scenario: When user wants detailed comparison of specific content

output_examples.input: Search for top trending cooking videos on PiPiXia

best_practices: Set up MAXHUB_API_KEY and MAXHUB_BASE_URL environment variables before use to enable authentication
Use rate limiting awareness: check balance before batch operations and confirm before paginating beyond 5 pages
Chain API calls strategically: search first to get IDs, then fetch details for the most relevant items only
anti_patterns: Do not request unlimited pagination - the skill defaults to 50 items max and 5 pages per request for cost control
Do not skip balance checks before batch operations - unexpected API charges may occur otherwise
Do not assume real-time data - PiPiXia data may have a short delay from live metrics

faq.question: Do I need an API key to use this skill?
faq.answer: Yes, you need a MaxHub API key configured as MAXHUB_API_KEY environment variable. Register at aconfig.cn to get your key.

faq.question: What data can I collect with this skill?
faq.answer: You can fetch posts, user profiles, follower counts, hot search rankings, comments, and hashtag data from PiPiXia platform.

faq.question: Is there a rate limit?
faq.answer: MaxHub API defaults to 60 calls per minute. The skill also limits batch operations and pagination to control costs.

faq.question: Can I perform actions like liking or following users?
faq.answer: No, this skill only reads public data. It cannot perform engagement actions, post content, or modify any user data.

faq.question: How do I avoid unexpected charges?
faq.answer: Check your account balance before each session. The skill will remind you after 20 consecutive calls and before operations exceeding 5 pages.

faq.question: Is my data stored or shared?
faq.answer: No. This skill only reads data through MaxHub API and returns it to you. No data is stored on external servers.
